hooks.command:
jq -r '"\(.tool_input.file_path)"' | grep -E '^(src/|dataset/|scripts/|pyproject.toml)' | { read -r f; [ -s "$f" ] && python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
path = '$f'.strip()
with open(path) as fh:
    content = fh.read()

# Extract functions, classes, IMPROVEMENT markers
funcs = re.findall(r'def (\w+)', content)
classes = re.findall(r'class (\w+)', content)
impl_match = re.findall(r'IMPROVEMENT[:\s#]*(\d+)', content)
ablation = re.findall(r'--(\w+(?:_\w+)*)\s+\{', content)

changes = []
if classes: changes.append('Classes: ' + ', '.join(classes))
if funcs: changes.append('Functions: ' + ', '.join(funcs[:5]))
if impl_match: changes.append('IMPROVEMENT markers: ' + ', '.join(impl_match))
if ablation: changes.append('Ablation flags: ' + ', '.join(ablation[:5]))

entry = f'## {path}\n' + ('\n'.join(changes) if changes else '*(no parseable symbols)*')

changelog_path = '.claude/changes.md'
with open(changelog_path, 'a') as ch:
    ch.write(entry + '\n\n')
print('synced:', path)
" || echo "hook-py-err"; } || echo "no-match"
